4 bed | 2.5 bath 3200 Sq. Ft.
Active | 559900
Welcome to 480 Sugar Prairie Bend, a beautiful, recently constructed home in Sweetbay Farm where thoughtful design, smart technology, and elevated finishes come together at a level that demands to be experienced firsthand. Natural light moves through this home differently than most. From the main level to the upper floor, oversized windows draw daylight into every corner, filling each space with the kind of warmth that transforms every ordinary moment into something worth savoring. Classic hardwood floors run throughout the main level, bringing a warm, high-end finish that anchors the home's luxury yet urban farmhouse character. The spacious main level office, enclosed by glass French doors, offers a private and polished workspace without sacrificing its connection to the rest of the home. The kitchen earns its reputation as the heart of the home, with smart GE Cafe appliances that connect to your phone and soft-close cabinetry that makes even the smallest details feel considered. The extended morning room creates a cozy yet open and breathable dining area, and the light that pours through those rear-facing windows throughout the day has to be experienced to be understood. Upstairs, the layout was designed with privacy in mind. Each bedroom is positioned to function as its own retreat, separate and quiet, while the open flex space creates a natural gathering point between them. The primary suite and spa-style bath complete an upper level that gives everyone in the home exactly the space they need. The finished garage, whole-home water filtration, and app-enabled major appliances round out a home where every detail was considered. Additional bronze hardware set conveys. Quick access to GA-316, I-85, the Sugarloaf corridor, Treetop Mill, grocery, dining, and everyday conveniences. 4 bedrooms. 2.5 baths. Built 2024. Sweetbay Farm.
Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Georgia Properties | (770) 355-5995 | DRE: 434290

Do you live in the Atlanta area?

Want to learn the RIGHT way to file your taxes if homeownership is the goal?

Then this is for you.

On 3.12.26 at 6:30 PM I’m hosting a FREE pop-up class designed specifically for self-employed homebuyers who want to make sure their tax filing strategy actually supports their homeownership goals.

When you’re self-employed, the way you file your taxes can directly impact how much home you qualify for. Many entrepreneurs accidentally reduce their buying power simply because no one explained how lenders calculate income.

In this class we’ll cover:

✔ How lenders calculate self-employed income

✔ What to discuss with your CPA before filing
✔ How to protect your buying power if homeownership is the goal

If you’re a freelancer, business owner, 1099 worker, or entrepreneur in the Atlanta area and you haven’t filed your taxes yet, this is information you’ll want to have first.

✨ comment the word “TAX” and I’ll send you the details and the link!

RSVP for the FREE pop-up class today.

Happy Holidays from my family to yours!!!","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122329394042006944","photo","0","0","0","2","5","0"],["20251128212204","","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122328690404006944","photo","0","0","0","1","3","0"],["20251128211913","","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122328690266006944","photo","0","0","0","1","3","0"],["20251125220528","LOLLLL Okay Okay! Read to the end and let me cook... I picked up a new phrase in London this weekend… “Mind the gap.”
And while they are talking about trains, personal space, and putting too much dip on your chip 🤣 it instantly made me think about the two gaps buyers do not pay attention to until it is too late.

The biggest mistake you can make is making an emotional purchase and chasing the shiny new hacks you hear other people doing when it comes to negotiating the purchase of your home.

So let’s talk about the two real estate gaps you actually need to be mindful of:

✨ Gap 1: The Appraisal Gap
This is the difference between what the home appraises for and what you agreed to pay.
If the appraisal comes in low, you are responsible for the difference.
Example
Contract price 450,000
Appraised value 430,000
You now have a 20,000 appraisal gap that must be paid out of pocket.

✨ Gap 2: The Equity Gap on Assumable Loans
Assumable loans sound amazing because of the low rates, but people forget the part where you have to pay the seller all of their equity upfront.
Example
Loan balance 220,000
Purchase price 375,000
That creates a 155,000 equity gap you must bring to the table.
Amazing rate or not, that number is real cash due at closing.

When is it a good idea
When you have strong reserves and the long term savings truly beat the upfront cost. A low rate can absolutely be worth it when the numbers make sense for your budget and long term plan.

When is it not a good idea
When covering the appraisal gap or equity gap drains your savings, adds financial stress, or pulls you away from your other goals. A good deal is not good if it leaves you stretched thin on day one.

Mind the gap and move wisely.

If you want to understand how these numbers apply to your own home buying budget, DM me. Let’s look at the numbers together so you can avoid costly mistakes and get into the right home the right way.","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122328164168006944","album","0","0","0","2","2","0"],["20251124180932","Every time this list comes out and my name is on it, I’m honestly shocked. I don’t pause to celebrate myself nearly as much as I should, even the small wins. But being surrounded by people who see you, celebrate you, and cheer for your effort? That’s something I’ve grown to appreciate deeply. As someone who isn’t a stranger to burnout, moments like this remind me that the work I’m doing matters.

#southfultontopproducer #topproducer #realestateagent #atlantarealtor","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122327909558006944","photo","0","0","0","1","1","0"],["20251122162622","With so many new faces here I wanted to reintroduce myself.

I’m Diana Imani a REALTOR based in Atlanta and my mission is to help people create stability wealth and peace through homeownership.

I take a lifestyle-first approach to real estate because I believe your home should fit who you’re becoming not just where you’re living today. My work is rooted in intention education and care so you always feel clear confident and supported at every step of the process.

Whether you’re buying selling investing or simply getting curious about your options I’m here to guide you with strategy heart and honesty. Home is personal and you deserve someone who listens and understands where you’re headed next.

I’m glad you’re here. Let’s find your next chapter together.

#homeowner #houseforsale #realestateagent #rmsma","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122325441254006944","photo","0","0","0","1","3","0"],["20251112220830","If you’re looking for a budget-friendly and sustainable way to decorate your home, try thrifting or antiquing. 🪑⚱️🛋 🖼 Follow these tips to make shopping secondhand a breeze:

• Shop with a list of what you need, but be open to inspiration striking you.
• Review goods thoroughly before you buy them, looking for signs of damage and making sure they’re stable. 
• Verify the price. Unless a piece has historic value or is completely original, it should be cheaper than shopping new.
• Finally, take your time! Don’t make impulse buys you may regret later.

Want more tips to decorate your home with amazing impact? 🏠 ✨ 😮 Send a message today!

Get the recipe below!","https://facebook.com/122181648578006944/posts/122323579010006944","link","0","0","0","0","0","0"],["20251031220558","As the ghosts and goblins come out to play, safety should always be the name of the game! 👻🍬 Here are some fang-tastic tips to keep your little trick-or-treaters safe and sound:

🔴 Always have a responsible adult accompany children.
🔴 Carry flashlights or glow sticks to stay visible in the dark. Reflective costumes and accessories are great ideas too.
🔴 Stick to familiar neighborhoods and well-lit streets. Plot your path in advance to avoid wandering into unfamiliar territory.
🔴 Inspect all candy before indulging. Discard open or suspicious-looking treats.
🔴 Remind kids to use sidewalks and crosswalks and look both ways before crossing streets.

👉 Most importantly, have a fun and safe Halloween! 🎉🧙‍♀️🍫 How do you plan on celebrating? Let me know in the comments!
